events.name: Open Source Software in the Age of AI
events.description:
Meetup group: Dot Net North

AI coding assistants are changing how developers write code, but what does that mean for open source software? This talk explores when to depend on a library or framework and when it makes sense to generate code with AI instead. We’ll look at how AI both helps and hinders OSS projects, and share practical ways you can continue (start?!) to support the maintainers and dependencies your applications depend on.

**Venue**

This meeting is at Bonded Warehouse; once part

events.description:
Meetup group: Journey to Democracy: The End of Tyranny

**What determines whether a country becomes free, stable, and prosperous — or remains trapped in instability and oppression?**
This event explores one of the most important patterns in human history:
how societies move from concentrated power and limited freedom toward systems that protect citizens and enable human flourishing.
